step.title: Load architecture
step.action: Read docs/planning-artifacts/architecture.md and extract components, APIs, and data model.
If PRD exists, load it for requirements context.

step.title: Define test strategy and pyramid
step.action: Define the overall test strategy: unit, integration, e2e, performance, security.
Design the test pyramid with ratios for each level.

step.title: Set coverage goals
step.action: Set coverage goals per component: line coverage, branch coverage, critical path coverage.

step.title: Select test framework
step.action: Select test frameworks and tools for each test level with rationale.

step.title: Plan CI integration
step.action: Design how tests integrate into CI/CD: stages, parallelism, gates, reporting.

step.title: Produce test plan
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with test design details.
